mapper.sql: id, project_id, template_name, template_category, template_type, scenario, version_no, file_id, status, description, metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into file_object ( project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, object_name, content_type, file_size, status, metadata, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{fileName}, #{objectName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{status}, #{metadata}, 1, 1 )
mapper.select: select id, project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, object_name, content_type, file_size, status, metadata from file_object where id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update file_object set biz_id = #{bizId}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into template ( project_id, template_name, template_category, template_type, scenario, version_no, file_id, status, description, metadata, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{templateName}, #{templateCategory}, #{templateType}, #{scenario}, #{versionNo}, #{fileId}, #{status}, #{description}, #{metadata}, 1, 1 )
mapper.select: select from template where id = #{templateId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update template set template_name = #{templateName}, template_type = #{templateType}, scenario = #{scenario}, version_no = #{versionNo}, description = #{description}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update template set status = #{status}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{templateId} and deleted = 0
update template set deleted = 1, updated_by = 1 where id = #{templateId} and deleted = 0
